MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-05-2014 IN 206, DEFENDANT JAMES MOYE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 8/11/14 IS CONTINUED TO 9/22/14 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. LAW AND MOTION 302, MTN TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES OF $4209.00, IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $25,000.00, PLUS REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,209.00, FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $29,209.00. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR #5976; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENG, FEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOYE, JAMES M $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,209.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $29,209.00, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attorney Fees Of $4209.00
Off Calendar Jan-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. RICHARD M. BRYAN of Bryan & Hinshaw, P.C., Tel No. (415) 296-0800 apppearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FEI MENG'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attorney Fees Of $4209.00 is granted. No opposition filed. Pursuant to the terms of the parties' settlement agreement, judgment is entered in favor of Plaintiff in the amount of $25,000.00, plus reasonable attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $4,209.00, for a total judgment of $29,209.00. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)
